messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## IPSec VPN

### CPE

```hcl
resource "oci_core_cpe" "cpe" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  display_name  = "my-cpe"
  ip_address   = "203.0.113.1"
  provider_name = "Cisco"
}
```

### IPSec Connection

```hcl
resource "oci_core_ipsec_connection" "vpn" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  drg_id        = oci_core_drg.drg.id
  cpe_id        = oci_core_cpe.cpe.id
  display_name = "my-vpn"

  tunnel_configuration {
    shared_secret      = "your-shared-secret"
    availability_domain = "1"
  }
}
```

### Static Routes

```hcl
# Routes from on-prem to OCI
static_routes = ["10.0.0.0/16"]
```

### BGP Routing

- Enable BGP on CPE
- Use dynamic routing
